add-png-image-pdffilemend.title: Add PNG Image to PDF Page Using PdfFileMend
add-png-image-pdffilemend.description: Demonstrates binding an existing PDF with PdfFileMend and inserting a PNG image onto page two at specified coordinates.

replace-jpeg-with-bmp.title: Replace JPEG Image on First Page with BMP Using PdfContentEditor
replace-jpeg-with-bmp.description: Demonstrates how to replace a JPEG image on the first page of a PDF with a higher‑resolution BMP image using PdfContentEditor.ReplaceImage.

overlay-gif-onto-png.title: Overlay Semi-Transparent GIF onto PNG in PDF using CompositingParameters
overlay-gif-onto-png.description: Demonstrates how to overlay a semi‑transparent GIF image onto an existing PNG image on the same PDF page using PdfFileMend and CompositingParameters.

add-word-wrapped-footer.title: Add Word-Wrapped Footer to PDF Pages
add-word-wrapped-footer.description: Demonstrates adding a formatted, word‑wrapped footer to every page of a PDF using PdfFileStamp.

add-promotional-text-multiple-pages.title: Add Promotional Text to Specific Pages Using PdfFileStamp
add-promotional-text-multiple-pages.description: Demonstrates inserting the same promotional message on pages 3, 5, and 7 of a PDF using PdfFileStamp.AddText with an array of page numbers.

add-multiline-text-block.title: Add Multi-line Text Block with Custom Line Spacing to Page Three
add-multiline-text-block.description: Demonstrates adding a multi‑line text paragraph with custom line spacing to the left margin of the third page of a PDF.

add-image-text-watermark.title: Add Image and Text Watermark to PDF
add-image-text-watermark.description: Demonstrates adding a semi‑transparent text overlay on top of an image as a watermark to each page of a PDF.

add-background-png-image.title: Add Background PNG Image to Every PDF Page
add-background-png-image.description: Demonstrates how to add a PNG background image to each page of a PDF by iterating through all pages and using PdfFileMend.AddImage.

add-header-image-multiple-pdfs.title: Add Header Image to Multiple PDFs
add-header-image-multiple-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to add a header image to each PDF in a list using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileStamp.

batch-add-company-logo.title: Batch Add Company Logo to PDFs
batch-add-company-logo.description: Processes all PDF files in a folder and adds a PNG logo to the top‑right corner of each page.

insert-png-signature-pdfmend.title: Insert PNG Signature on All PDF Pages using PdfFileMend
insert-png-signature-pdfmend.description: Demonstrates how to add a PNG signature image to the bottom‑left corner of every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileMend.

add-tiff-image-last-page.title: Add TIFF Image to Last Page of PDF using PdfFileMend
add-tiff-image-last-page.description: Demonstrates how to use PdfFileMend to insert a TIFF image onto the last page of an existing PDF without modifying other content.

place-image-dynamic.title: Place Image Dynamically Based on Page Size
place-image-dynamic.description: Demonstrates how to retrieve a PDF page's dimensions and calculate image placement coordinates before adding the image.

add-image-with-format-validation.title: Add Image to PDF with Format Validation
add-image-with-format-validation.description: Demonstrates how to validate an image's format before adding it to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

pdf-file-mend-try-finally.title: Add Image to PDF with PdfFileMend and Ensure Close via try-finally
pdf-file-mend-try-finally.description: Demonstrates using PdfFileMend to modify a PDF, saving changes, and guaranteeing resources are released with a try‑finally block that calls Close().

add-image-with-error-handling.title: Add Images to PDF with Error Handling
add-image-with-error-handling.description: Demonstrates adding images to a PDF page while catching exceptions from AddImage and logging the problematic image file path.

log-pdf-add-operations.title: Log AddImage and AddText Operations in PDF
log-pdf-add-operations.description: Demonstrates adding an image and text to a PDF using PdfFileMend while logging each operation with timestamp, page number, and file name for audit purposes.

word-wrap-bywords.title: Word Wrap ByWords for Text Paragraph
word-wrap-bywords.description: Demonstrates setting the WordWrapMode to ByWords on a TextParagraph before adding long text that exceeds the defined rectangle width.

add-image-to-pdf-page.title: Add Image to PDF Page Helper
add-image-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates a reusable helper method that inserts an image onto a specified page of a PDF at given coordinates.

add-images-pdf-http-response.title: Add Images to PDF and Return via HTTP Response
add-images-pdf-http-response.description: Demonstrates adding an image to a PDF using PdfFileMend, saving the result to a memory stream, and sending it to the client through an HTTP response.

extract-images-pdf-png.title: Extract Images from PDF to PNG Files
extract-images-pdf-png.description: Demonstrates extracting images from a PDF and saving each as a PNG using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor.

extract-images-from-pages.title: Extract Images from Specific PDF Pages
extract-images-from-pages.description: Extracts all images from pages 2 through 5 of a PDF and saves them to a temporary directory.

extract-images-from-pdfs.title: Extract Images from PDFs and Rename Using Page Number and Image Index
extract-images-from-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to batch‑extract all images from multiple PDF files and save each image with a filename that includes the source page number and a sequential image index.

remove-image-from-pdf-page.title: Remove Specific Image from PDF Page Using PdfContentEditor
remove-image-from-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to delete a particular image identified by its object ID from page four of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

remove-all-images.title: Remove All Images from PDF
remove-all-images.description: Demonstrates how to delete every image from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor and save the modified document.

replace-images-highres.title: Replace Images in PDF with High‑Resolution PNGs
replace-images-highres.description: Demonstrates how to replace each image in a PDF with a corresponding high‑resolution PNG using a loop over image indexes.

verify-text-position.title: Verify Text Position on PDF Page
verify-text-position.description: Adds text at specific coordinates to a PDF and verifies the X/Y position using Aspose.Pdf.

verify-pdf-modification-byte-size.title: Verify PDF Modification by Comparing Byte Size After Adding Image
verify-pdf-modification-byte-size.description: Creates a PDF, records its byte size, adds an image using PdfFileMend, saves the modified PDF, and compares the file sizes to confirm the modification.

async-pdf-modification.title: Asynchronous PDF Modification with PdfFileMend
async-pdf-modification.description: Demonstrates how to perform non‑blocking PDF modifications, such as adding an image, by wrapping PdfFileMend operations in Task.Run.
